channel.title: 2026 on Wayne Cater
channel.description: Recent content in 2026 on Wayne Cater

item.title: Owe You Everything, A Prayer
item.description: Recently I was cleaning up some files and I stumbled upon this idea that I penned in 2023. This simple little acoustic piece was never returned to and completed. I found myself thinking of it as a prayer as I listened to it. I hope this concept video and the song somehow bless you. Share it with others!
